sizing_rule.note: Maximum active equity ratio constrained by inverse of combined system weights to prevent margin calls at full f. If W=sum of weights, max active/total ratio = 1/W. Examples: W=3 → max 33.3%; W=2.4 → max 41.67%

source_rule_text: Maximum position sizing is constrained by the ratio of active equity to total equity, which cannot exceed the level that would trigger a margin call when trading at full f levels across multiple correlated systems.
